text:
> My own opinion is that this -current is too old to be a valid datapoint
 > for this bug report, but I have seen another failure as well.
 
 You are right, of course.
 
 I have upgraded to RELENG_7_1, reinstalled PERL-5.8.9. After that 'net-mgmt=
 /net-snmp' build has completed successfully. SNMP daemon has started succes=
 sfully as well.
